Observe.Resolve.Automate.
FunctionsArchitectureUse CasesLawsToolsTrainingAbout

Framework

Tool Landscape

Tools are mapped to functions with full, partial, or no coverage. No single tool covers all functions. The combination of active and passive instruments is required to achieve complete observability.

Active Monitoring

Active Monitoring

Emblasoft Evolver

Emblasoft

Service assurance, validation and testing for mobile network services — from 5G SA to legacy. A single cloud-native platform covering active monitoring, functional testing, performance testing and service enablement across any network.

●F1●F3●F5●F6●F9●F10◑F2
Active Monitoring

Emblasoft Evolver (Functional Testing)

Emblasoft

Functional testing capability within Evolver for validating network features and updates, supporting CI/CD schedules. Any scenario can be modelled for proving service capabilities in multi-vendor networks.

●F3●F4●F9◑F1

Passive Probe

Passive Probe

Emblasoft nScan

Emblasoft

Real-time passive monitoring platform providing continuous visibility into live network behaviour from SS7 to 5G SA. Captures every session for deep diagnostics, subscriber tracing and root cause analysis across voice, data and messaging.

●F2●F7●F8◑F1◑F5
Passive Probe

Emblasoft nScan (Analytics)

Emblasoft

Advanced analytics layer within nScan providing competitive visibility, deep KPI trending and anomaly detection across millions of real subscriber records using high-performance column-based data storage.

●F4◑F9◑F1

Hybrid

Hybrid

Evolver + nScan

Emblasoft

The combination of Emblasoft Evolver (active monitoring) and Emblasoft nScan (passive monitoring) delivers complete service assurance: passive visibility into every live subscriber session, validated and reproduced under controlled conditions by active synthetic testing.

●F1●F2●F3●F5●F7●F8
